data.title: Broadcom's shares fall 4% despite Q4 earnings beat and record AI revenue, with concerns over shrinking margins and higher tax rate overshadowing growth.
data.description: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) saw its shares drop over 4% in after-hours trading despite reporting a fourth-quarter earnings beat and record artificial intelligence (AI) revenue. The company's AI sales surged by 74%, reaching a total revenue of $18.02 billion, which exceeded analyst estimates of $17.49 billion. However, investors were concerned about the company's guidance on shrinking gross margins and a significant increase in the tax rate for fiscal 2026. CFO Kirsten Spears warned of a 100 basis points drop in gross margins for the first quarter, attributed to a shift in revenue mix towards lower-margin AI hardware components. This led to worries over profitless growth, where revenue expansion comes at the expense of efficiency. Additionally, Broadcom forecasted a rise in its non-GAAP tax rate from 14%. Analysts were wary due to these factors, resulting in the negative market sentiment towards the company.

data.title: Bitcoin's bear flag signals $76K price target as bearish divergences and low momentum predict $50K price.
data.description: Bitcoin is facing bearish pressure with price targets at $76,000 and $50,000 due to divergences and a lack of upward momentum.

data.title: Chindata and HEC expand collaboration with AI projects in Shaoguan and Ulanqab, boosting development in Guangdong and Inner Mongolia.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Chindata Group revealed two major collaborations with HEC Group, focusing on progressing joint development efforts in Shaoguan, Guangdong Province, and Ulanqab, Inner Mongolia. These partnerships seek to combine expertise in industrial development and aim to enhance coherence between the regions.

data.title: Gold Royalty Corp. acquires Pedra Branca Royalty. (NYSE: GROY) #Gold #Acquisition
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 12, 2025, Gold Royalty Corp. (NYSE American: GROY) announced the successful finalization of its acquisition of a royalty, known as the "Royalty," relating to the Pedra Branca project. This update comes subsequent to the company’s initial press release on December 8, 2025.

data.title: Sectra reports strong growth in first half of 25/26: high order bookings, increased sales, profitability driven by customer satisfaction.
data.description: In Linköping, Sweden on December 12, 2025, Sectra, a global medical imaging IT and cybersecurity firm (STO: SECT B), announced a significant rise in order bookings, sales, and profitability during the initial half of the 2025/26 fiscal year. The company's strong focus on customer satisfaction led to the development of new partnerships and extensions in their services.

data.title: Kioxia develops technology for high-density, low-power 3D DRAM, presented at IEDM. Reduction in power consumption expected.
data.description: In Tokyo, Kioxia Corporation, a prominent player in memory solutions, unveiled advanced oxide-semiconductor channel transistors that facilitate the creation of high-density, energy-efficient 3D DRAM. Revealed at the IEEE International Electron Devices Meeting (IEDM) in San Francisco on December 10, this innovation could significantly decrease power usage in various sectors such as AI servers. This breakthrough promises enhanced performance through stacked transistors, marking a leap forward in memory technology.

data.title: Sunwoda's 314Ah cell certified by EPD International, world's first in battery industry. Stock Code: 300207.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on December 12, 2025, Sunwoda, identified by Stock Code 300207, declared that its 314Ah energy storage cell received certification from EPD International. This accreditation marks a significant milestone as it makes Sunwoda the pioneer in the global battery sector to achieve this recognition.
